data.body: Fourth review BLOCK remediation: accepted duplicate enforcement findings f9fb692b8d7f8338d/f14904efd491c0b86 by naming verify.enforce_plan_material_pins, its boolean/default/owner, and the test toggle; pin collection remains mandatory in both states. Accepted duplicate activation findings f6e52ef8d6e8eed15/f31893c1dea8fb60b by stating acaf wires all signing paths on the feature branch and 5967 only wraps those calls in the unified atomic transaction. Removed the misleading snapshot_head analogy and specified collect_plan_relation_snapshot full signature plus refresh internal call. Rerunning before downstream review.
